sentences.translation: Iman je stala na stanici autobusa.
sentences.translationEn: Iman stood at the bus stop.
The bus was ten minutes late.

sentences.translation: Razgovarala je s gospođom koja stoji pored nje.
sentences.translationEn: She talked with a woman standing next to her.

sentences.translation: Na kraju je autobus stigao i obje su ušle.
sentences.translationEn: Finally the bus arrived and they both got on.
